<!-- AUTOGENERATED by scripts/gen-readmes.sh — edit scenarios.tsv -->
# Apache HTTPD (AJP) — root-to-custom-context-servlet-mapping

AJP proxy at /ui/, app on /app context with VAADIN_URL_MAPPING=/ui/*. The proxy prepends /app when forwarding to the backend; /ui/HILLA and /ui/connect are rewritten to /app/HILLA and /app/connect (Hilla resources live at the context root, not under the Vaadin servlet mapping). The AJP catch-all carries root-level static resources; PUSH uses a direct HTTP/WebSocket proxy since AJP does not carry WebSocket frames.

Proxy URL on `http://localhost:9090`: `/ui/`

## Configuration

See [docker-compose.yml](./docker-compose.yml) for service definitions.

Apache HTTPD config (`vaadin.conf`):

```apache
RewriteEngine on
RewriteCond %{HTTP:Upgrade}    websocket [NC]
RewriteCond %{HTTP:Connection} upgrade [NC]
# WebSocket frames are not carried over AJP, so PUSH connections are proxied
# directly to Vaadin's HTTP port. /app prefix is added on the backend side;
# Hilla push collapses /ui/HILLA back to /app/HILLA, while Vaadin push stays
# under the /ui mapping and resolves to /app/ui/VAADIN/push.
# /ui/HILLA/push  -> /app/HILLA/push
# /ui/VAADIN/push -> /app/ui/VAADIN/push
# $2 = 'HILLA' if path matches /ui/HILLA/*, otherwise blank
# $3 = 'ui' if path does not match /ui/HILLA/*, otherwise blank
RewriteRule ^/(ui/(HILLA)|(ui))/(.*) "ws://vaadin:8080/app/$2$3/$4" [P,L]

# Hilla browser-callables and push: backend serves them at /app/HILLA and
# /app/connect (context root), not under /ui.
ProxyPass         /ui/HILLA/    ajp://vaadin:8009/app/HILLA/
ProxyPass         /ui/connect/  ajp://vaadin:8009/app/connect/
ProxyPass         /             ajp://vaadin:8009/app/
ProxyPassReverseCookiePath "/app" "/"
```
